      =E8=AF=86=E5=88=AB=E4=BA=BA=E5=B7=A5=E6= =99=BA=E8=83=BD=E7=94=9F=E6=88=90=E7=9A=84=E6=96=87=E7=8C=AE=E6=91=98=E8=A6= =81=E4=B8=AD=E5=8F=AF=E8=83=BD=E5=AD=98=E5=9C=A8=E7=9A=84=E5=81=8F=E8=A7=81= =EF=BC=8C=E5=B9=B6=E6=8D=AE=E6=AD=A4=E8=B0=83=E6=95=B4=E7=A0=94=E7=A9=B6=E8= =8C=83=E5=9B=B4=E3=80=82

      Applying it to AI use

      Making honest and informed decisions about whether GenAI supports, rathe= r than replaces, your own work.

      An example

      Only use AI when it adds genuine value and helps with your learning or d= evelopment.

      Applying it to AI use

      Use GenAI in line with QM guidelines, thereby contributing to the shared= culture of academic integrity, which is integral value of your degree.

      An example

      Acknowledging and referencing any GenAI assistance in your assessment af= ter checking whether or how AI can be used in that particular assignment.

       

      Applying it to AI use

      Evaluate and work critically with Generative AI outp= uts

      An example

      Critically evaluate output from GenAI = tools and ensure this is backed up with reliable sources and your own intep= retation.

footer, header, nav, section { display: block; } h1 { font-size: 2em; margin: 0.67em 0px; } figcaption, figure, main { display: block; } figure { margin: 1em 40px; } hr { box-sizing: content-box; height: 0px; overflow: visible; } pre { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; } a { background-color: transparent; } abbr[title] { border-bottom: none; text-decoration: underline dotted; } b, strong { font-weight: bolder; } code, kbd, samp { font-family: monospace, monospace; font-size: 1em; } dfn { font-style: italic; } mark { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); } small { font-size: 80%; } sub, sup { font-size: 75%; line-height: 0; position: relative; vertical-ali= gn: baseline; } sub { bottom: -0.25em; } sup { top: -0.5em; } audio, video { display: inline-block; } audio:not([controls]) { display: none; height: 0px; } img { border-style: none; } svg:not(:root) { overflow: hidden; } button, input, optgroup, select, textarea { font-family: [type=3D"button"] { appea= rance: button; } fieldset { padding: 0.35em 0.75em 0.625em; } legend { box-sizing: border-box; color: inherit; display: table; max-width:= 100%; padding: 0px; white-space: inherit; } blockquote, dd, dl, figure, h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6, p, pre { margin: 0px; } button { background: transparent; padding: 0px; } button:focus { outline: -webkit-focus-ring-color auto 5px; } border-color: rgb(176, 179, 18= 3); padding: 8px 16px; cursor: pointer; user-select: none; display: flex; } .tertiary-nav__toggle-label { flex: 1 1 auto; padding-left: 8px; } .tertiary-nav__toggle .icon { flex: 0 0 auto; margin-left: auto; } .tertiary-nav__items { display: none; border-width: 2px; border-color: rg= b(206, 166, 0); margin-top: -2px; } .tertiary-nav.is-open .tertiary-nav__items { display: block; } .tertiary-nav.is-open .tertiary-nav__toggle .icon { transform: rotate(180= deg); } .tertiary-nav__items a { padding: 14px 8px 15px 30px; margin-bottom: 1px;= } .tertiary-nav__items > ul > li > a { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255)= ; } .tertiary-nav__items > ul > li:first-child a { font-weight: 600; backgrou= nd-color: rgb(248, 243, 224); } .tertiary-nav .arrow-down + a::before, .tertiary-nav .arrow-right + a::be= fore { top: 14px; } } @media (min-width: 992px) { .tertiary-nav__items a { margin-bottom: 2px; padding: 9px 8px 10px 30px; = } .tertiary-nav__items > ul > li:first-child a { font-weight: 600; color: r= gb(12, 116, 106); text-decoration: none; font-size: 1.1667rem; background-c= olor: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding-left: 0px; } } .vertabs__container { background-color: rgb(230, 242, 241); } .vertabs__content:first-child { display: block; } .vertabs__more { margin-top: 0.4444rem; } @media (max-width: 767px) { .vertabs__header { margin-bottom: 0.8889rem; } .vertabs__note { margin-bottom: 1.3333rem; } .vertabs__tabs { display: none; } .vertabs [data-role=3D"switcher"] { background-color: rgb(230, 242, 241);= padding: 1.3333rem 1.3333rem 0.4444rem; } .vertabs [data-role=3D"switcher"] .select { width: 100%; } } @media (min-width: 768px) { .vertabs__header { margin-bottom: 2.2222rem; } .vertabs__body { display: flex; } .vertabs [data-role=3D"switcher"] { display: none; } .vertabs__options { width: 270px; flex: 0 0 270px; padding-right: 1.7778r= em; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .vertabs__container { flex: 1 1 auto; width: calc(100% - 270px); } .vertabs__tabs { order: 1; } .vertabs__note { margin-top: 0.8889rem; margin-bottom: 0.8889rem; order: = 2; } .vertabs__tab { background-color: rgb(236, 237, 238); position: relative;= } .vertabs__tab + .vertabs__tab { margin-top: 0.4444rem; } .vertabs__tab a { padding: 0.4444rem 0.8889rem; text-decoration: none; co= lor: rgb(133, 137, 143); display: block; outline: none; } .vertabs__label-primary { display: block; font-weight: 600; } .vertabs__label-secondary { display: block; } .vertabs__tab.is-active { background-color: rgb(13, 129, 117); color: rgb= (255, 255, 255); } .vertabs__tab.is-active a { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); outline: none; } .vertabs__tab.is-active a:focus { outline: rgb(176, 179, 183) auto 5px; } .vertabs__tab a:focus { outline: (max-width: 767px) { .video-card__info { padding: 0.8889rem; } } @media (min-width: 768px) { .video-card { display: flex; } .video-card__title { font-size: 2.3333rem; margin-bottom: 0.8889rem; } ition: relative; width: 40%; z-index: 2; } .video-card__info::after { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); position= : absolute; display: block; content: ""; top: 0px; bottom: 0px; width: 50%;= transform: translateX(-100%); z-index: 1; } } @media (min-width: 992px) { .video-card { max-width: 61rem; margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } } .slat { width: 100%; padding-left: 0.8889rem; margin-top: -1px; padding-top: 1px; } .slat__container--small { max-width: 67.2778rem; } .slat--grey { background-color: rgb(246, 246, 246); } .slat--blue { background-color: rgb(13, 50, 115); color: rgb(255, 255, 255)= ; } .slat--notched { position: relative; padding-top: 45px; } .slat--notched::before { position: absolute; top: 0px; left: 50%; transform= : translate(-50%); content: " "; width: 0px; height: 0px; border-left: 30px= solid transparent; border-right: 30px solid transparent; border-top: 30px = solid rgb(255, 255, 255); } .slat--oblique { background: linear-gradient(165deg, rgb(255, 255, 255), rg= b(255, 255, 255) 40%, rgb(246, 246, 246) 0px, rgb(246, 246, 246)); } .slat--imgfade { background-repeat: no-repeat; background-size: cover; back= ground-position: 50% 50%; position: relative; } .slat--imgfade::before { content: ""; inset: 0px; display: block; backgroun= d: rgb(13, 50, 115); height: 100%; width: 100%; position: absolute; opacity= : 0.7; z-index: 1; } .slat--imgfade .slat__container { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); position: rela= tive; z-index: 2; } @media (min-width: 768px) { .slat { padding-left: 1.7778rem; padding-right: 1.7778rem; } } .breadcrumb { padding-top: 1.3333rem; padding-bottom: 1.3333rem; } @media (min-width: 992px) { .breadcrumb--ls-half .breadcrumb__container > * { width: 50%; } } .calendar-slat { padding: 1.7778rem 0.8889rem; } .calendar-slat__container { min-height: 260px; } .calendar-slat__title { margin-bottom: 0.8889rem; } .calendar-slat__links > * + * { padding-top: 0.4444rem; display: block; } .calendar-slat__events { padding-top: 1.3333rem; } .calendar-slat__events > * + * { padding-top: 0.8889rem; } @media (min-width: 768px) { .calendar-slat { padding-left: 1.7778rem; padding-right: 1.7778rem; paddi= ng-bottom: 1.7778rem; } .calendar-slat__container { display: flex; flex-direction: row; align-ite= ms: center; } .calendar-slat__intro { flex: 1 0 auto; padding-right: 4rem; } .calendar-slat__events { flex: 1 1 auto; padding-top: 0px; margin-top: -3= rem; } .calendar-slat__events > :only-child { margin-top: 3rem; } } @media (min-width: 1200px) { .calendar-slat__intro { flex: 1 0 auto; } .calendar-slat__events { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content:= space-between; } .calendar-slat__event { width: 100%; } .calendar-slat__events > :first-child:nth-last-child(3), xm-select { background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); position: relative; borde= r: 1px solid rgb(230, 230, 230); border-radius: 2px; display: block; width:= 100%; cursor: pointer; outline: none; } xm-select * { margin: 0px; padding: 0px; box-sizing: border-box; font-size:= 14px; font-weight: 400; text-overflow: ellipsis; user-select: none; } xm-select:hover, xm-select:focus { border-color: rgb(192, 196, 204); } xm-select > .xm-tips { color: rgb(153, 153, 153); padding: 0px 10px; positi= on: absolute; display: flex; height: 100%; align-items: center; } xm-select > .xm-icon { display: inline-block; overflow: hidden; position: a= bsolute; width: 0px; height: 0px; right: 10px; top: 50%; margin-top: -3px; = cursor: pointer; border-width: 6px; border-style: solid dashed dashed; bord= er-color: rgb(194, 194, 194) transparent transparent; border-image: initial= ; transition: 0.3s; } xm-select > .xm-icon-expand { margin-top: -9px; transform: rotate(180deg); = } xm-select > .xm-label.single-row { position: absolute; inset: 0px 30px 0px = 0px; overflow: auto hidden; } xm-select > .xm-label.single-row .scroll { overflow-y: hidden; } xm-select > .xm-label.single-row .label-content { flex-wrap: nowrap; white-= space: nowrap; } xm-select > .xm-label.auto-row .label-content { flex-wrap: wrap; padding-ri= ght: 30px !important; } xm-select > .xm-label.auto-row .xm-label-block > span { white-space: unset;= height: 100%; } xm-select > .xm-label .scroll .label-content { display: flex; padding: 3px = 10px; } xm-select > .xm-label .xm-label-block { display: flex; position: relative; = padding: 0px 5px; margin: 2px 5px 2px 0px; border-radius: 3px; align-items:= baseline; color: rgb(255, 255, 255); } xm-select > .xm-label .xm-label-block > span { display: flex; color: rgb(25= 5, 255, 255); white-space: nowrap; } xm-select > .xm-label .xm-label-block > i { color: rgb(255, 255, 255); marg= in-left: 8px; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; display: flex; } xm-select > .xm-label .xm-label-block.disabled { background-color: rgb(194,= 194, 194) !important; cursor: no-drop !important; } xm-select > .xm-label .xm-label-block.disabled > i { cursor: no-drop
